name: Eldritch Blast
description: A beam of crackling energy. Make a ranged spell attack; on a hit, the target takes 1d10 force damage (one additional beam at levels 5, 11, 17).

name: Fire Bolt
description: Hurl a mote of fire at a creature or object. Make a ranged spell attack; on a hit, 1d10 fire damage (scales at higher levels).

name: Sacred Flame
description: Flame-like radiance descends. Target must succeed on a DEX save or take 1d8 radiant damage (no cover bonus).

name: Guidance
description: Touch one willing creature; it can add 1d4 to one ability check before the spell ends.

name: Vicious Mockery
description: Unleash a string of insults; target makes a WIS save or takes 1d4 psychic damage and has disadvantage on its next attack roll.

name: Shillelagh
description: Your club or quarterstaff becomes magical; use your spellcasting modifier for attack/damage, dealing 1d8.

name: Toll the Dead
description: Point at a creature; it makes a WIS save or takes 1d8 necrotic damage (1d12 if already missing HP).

name: Mage Hand
description: A spectral floating hand appears; it can manipulate objects, open doors, or stow/retrieve items (max 10 lb).

name: Minor Illusion
description: Create a sound or image of an object. Creatures can use an action to examine and make an Investigation check vs. your spell save DC.

name: Prestidigitation
description: Minor magical tricks: light a fire, clean or soil an object, chill/warm/flavor food, create a trinket, or leave a symbol.

name: Light
description: An object you touch sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light for an additional 20 feet.

name: Magic Missile
description: Three darts of magical force each deal 1d4+1 force damage; each dart always hits its target. +1 dart per slot above 1st.

name: Burning Hands
description: A thin sheet of flames erupts; each creature in a 15-ft cone makes a DEX save or takes 3d6 fire damage (half on success). +1d6 per slot above 1st.

name: Cure Wounds
description: A creature you touch regains 1d8 + your spellcasting modifier HP. +1d8 per slot above 1st.

name: Hex
description: Curse a target; it takes 1d6 necrotic damage when you hit it. Choose one ability: the target has disadvantage on checks using it. Lasts longer at higher slots.

name: Shield
description: Reaction when hit by an attack or targeted by magic missile: +5 AC until the start of your next turn; immune to magic missile.

name: Bless
description: Up to three creatures add 1d4 to attack rolls and saving throws. +1 creature per slot above 1st.

name: Detect Magic
description: You sense the presence of magic within 30 feet and can discern its school of magic by using your action.

name: Sleep
description: Roll 5d8; creatures with the fewest HP (starting from 0) within 20 ft of a point fall unconscious until damaged or woken. +2d8 per slot above 1st.

name: Thunderwave
description: A wave of thunderous force pushes out; each creature in the cube makes a CON save or takes 2d8 thunder damage and is pushed 10 feet (half damage on success). +1d8 per slot above 1st.

name: Healing Word
description: A creature of your choice within range regains 1d4 + your spellcasting modifier HP. +1d4 per slot above 1st.

name: Hunter's Mark
description: Choose a creature; you deal +1d6 damage to it on each of your weapon attacks and have advantage on Perception/Survival checks to track it. Lasts longer at higher slots.

name: Charm Person
description: One humanoid makes a WIS save or is charmed by you for 1 hour (or until harmed). +1 target per slot above 1st.

name: Disguise Self
description: Change your appearance (clothes, features, height ±1 ft) until the spell ends. Investigation check vs. your spell save DC to see through it.

name: Misty Step
description: Briefly surrounded by silvery mist, you teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see.

name: Shatter
description: A sudden loud ringing noise: each creature in a 10-ft sphere makes a CON save or takes 3d8 thunder damage (half on success). Inorganic objects always fail. +1d8 per slot above 2nd.

name: Hold Person
description: A humanoid makes a WIS save or is paralyzed; it repeats the save at end of each of its turns. +1 target per slot above 2nd.

name: Invisibility
description: A creature you touch becomes invisible until the spell ends or it attacks/casts a spell. +1 target per slot above 2nd.

name: Aid
description: Up to three creatures gain 5 additional HP (both current and maximum) for the duration. +5 HP per slot above 2nd.

name: Moonbeam
description: A silvery beam of pale light fills a 5-ft radius cylinder; each creature that enters the area makes a CON save or takes 2d10 radiant damage. +1d10 per slot above 2nd.

name: Spiritual Weapon
description: Summon a floating weapon; as a bonus action, move it up to 20 ft and make a melee spell attack dealing 1d8 + your spellcasting modifier. +1d8 per 2 slot levels above 2nd.

name: Fireball
description: A bright streak detonates in a 20-ft radius; each creature makes a DEX save or takes 8d6 fire damage (half on success). +1d6 per slot above 3rd.

name: Lightning Bolt
description: A stroke of lightning in a 100×5-ft line; each creature makes a DEX save or takes 8d6 lightning damage (half on success). +1d6 per slot above 3rd.

name: Counterspell
description: Attempt to interrupt a creature casting a spell. Spells of 3rd level or lower automatically fail; higher-level spells require an ability check (DC 10 + spell level).

name: Dispel Magic
description: End one magical effect on a target; effects of 3rd level or lower automatically end, higher-level effects require an ability check (DC 10 + effect's level).

name: Hypnotic Pattern
description: A twisting pattern enchants creatures in a 30-ft cube; each makes a WIS save or becomes charmed and incapacitated, moving along a beautiful path.

name: Mass Healing Word
description: Up to six creatures each regain 1d4 + your spellcasting modifier HP. +1d4 per slot above 3rd.

name: Spirit Guardians
description: Spectral spirits swarm around you; hostile creatures in range have their speed halved and must make a WIS save (on entry/start of turn) or take 3d8 radiant damage. +1d8 per slot above 3rd.

name: Banishment
description: Force a creature to make a CHA save or be banished; extraplanar creatures are permanently banished if concentration holds for the full minute.

name: Greater Invisibility
description: A creature you touch becomes invisible for the duration; the effect persists even if it attacks or casts spells.

name: Polymorph
description: Transform a creature into a new form; unwilling targets make a WIS save. The new form can be any beast of CR ≤ the target's (or ≤ your level for willing targets).

name: Wall of Force
description: An invisible wall of force springs into existence; it is immune to all damage and can't be dispelled. Can be shaped into a flat surface or a hemisphere.

name: Flame Strike
description: A vertical column of divine fire roars (10-ft radius, 40-ft tall cylinder); each creature makes a DEX save or takes 4d6 fire + 4d6 radiant damage (half on success). +1d6 each per slot above 5th.

action.higherLevelNote: +1d6 fire and +1d6 radiant per slot above 5th.

name: Hold Monster
description: Any creature (not just humanoid) makes a WIS save or is paralyzed; it repeats the save at end of each of its turns. +1 target per slot above 5th.
